approved_command_preview: Patch PR #271 current head 14d7b561b93fe03e9b0df5d2135ff731daa72341 after internal Codi/Adva review found an adjacent discovery-root symlink gap. The command verifies exact branch head and blob SHAs, updates only the PowerShell inventory and assembly parity tools plus focused tests, validates discovery roots and candidates before glob/stat/read/hash, runs focused and discovery tests plus CodeQL workflow validation, commits to the PR branch, and pushes with the bridged GitHub token. The PR remains Draft and no external review request is posted.
